creator: Joerg.Pulz@frm2.tum.de
text:
Update the net/isc-dhcp3-* ports to the most recent version 3.0.5 .
	Changes since 3.0.5rc2:
	- Failover servers try harder to retransmit binding updates upon
	  entering NORMAL state.

	Successful tinderbox tested on:

	RELENG_4	i386
	RELENG_5	i386
	RELENG_6	i386, amd64
	CURRENT		i386

Fix: - apply the patch
